short.en: FDM printing on a Bambu Lab P1S — PLA, PETG, and flexibles, with calibration and post-processing.
short.sl: FDM tisk na Bambu Lab P1S — PLA, PETG in fleksibilni materiali, s kalibracijo in post-obdelavo.

long.en: Bambu Lab P1S, more than 1,100 hours on the clock, maintained and calibrated personally. Send a model or let me design one — I optimise orientation, supports, and infill so the part actually survives the load. Sanding, painting, and assembly available on top.
long.sl: Bambu Lab P1S, več kot 1.100 ur dela, vzdrževan in kalibriran osebno. Pošlji model ali ga oblikujem zate — orientacijo, podpore in polnjenje optimiziram tako, da del dejansko prenese obremenitev. Brušenje, lakiranje in sestavljanje so na voljo dodatno.

en: Printed parts in PLA, PETG, or flexible filament
Quality photos of the delivered part
sl: Natisnjeni deli iz PLA, PETG ali fleksibilnega filamenta
Po želji brušenje, lakiranje in sestavljanje

en: Material and color preference if any
sl: Želen material in barva, če sta pomembna
